## Problem

What are you trying to do that the package doesn't support today?

## Proposed solution

Describe the API or behavior you'd like. If this touches the public API,
check it against `doc/API.md` and `doc/ARCHITECTURE.md` first — additive
changes are much more likely to be accepted than breaking ones.
